name: SubDCreationOptions
summary: Options used for creating a SubD

properties.name: ConcaveCornerTest
properties.summary: Get or sets the concave corner test option.

properties.name: ConvexCornersAndInteriorCreases
properties.summary: Look for convex corners at sub-D vertices with 2 edges that have an included angle <= 90 degrees.

properties.name: ConvexCornerTest
properties.summary: Get or sets the convex corner test option.

properties.name: InteriorCreases
properties.summary: Create an interior sub-D crease along all input mesh double edges

properties.name: InteriorCreaseTest
properties.summary: Get or sets the interior crease test option.

properties.name: InterpolateMeshVertices
properties.summary: If false, input mesh vertex locations will be used to set SubD vertex control net locations. If true, input mesh vertex locations will be used to set SubD vertex limit surface locations.

properties.name: MaximumConvexCornerAngleRadians
properties.summary: If ConvexCornerTest == ConvexCornerOption.AtMeshCorner, then an input mesh boundary vertex becomes a SubD corner when the number of edges that end at the vertex is <= MaximumConvexCornerEdgeCount edges and the corner angle is <= MaximumConvexCornerAngleRadians.

properties.name: MaximumConvexCornerEdgeCount
properties.summary: If ConvexCornerTest == ConvexCornerOption.AtMeshCorner, then an input mesh boundary vertex becomes a SubD corner when the number of edges that end at the vertex is <= MaximumConvexCornerEdgeCount edges and the corner angle is <= MaximumConvexCornerAngleRadians.

properties.name: MinimumConcaveCornerAngleRadians
properties.summary: If ConcaveCornerTest == ConcaveCornerOption.AtMeshCorner, then an input mesh boundary vertex becomes a SubD corner when the number of edges that end at the vertex is >= MinimumConcaveCornerEdgeCount edges and the corner angle is >= MinimumConcaveCornerAngleRadians.

properties.name: MinimumConcaveCornerEdgeCount
properties.summary: If ConcaveCornerTest == ConcaveCornerOption.AtMeshCorner, then an input mesh boundary vertex becomes a SubD corner when the number of edges that end at the vertex is >= MinimumConcaveCornerEdgeCount edges and the corner angle is >= MinimumConcaveCornerAngleRadians.

properties.name: Smooth
properties.summary: No interior creases and no corners.
